xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescriptionOfMainActivity: Manufacturing of Oleoresins, Spices Extract and Value-added teas
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ABriefOnTypesOfCustomersExplan: AVTNPL manufactures plant extracts and natural ingredient solutions for various leading corporations in food beverage, animal nutrition and nutraceuticals across the world.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsForGrievanceRedressalMe: THERE ARE NO INVESTORS OTHER THAN SHAREHOLDERS TO BE REGULATED

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheNationalAndInternatio: RFA FAIR TRADE, SME-TA 4 PILLAR AUDITED, ISO 14001:2015

Code of Conduct, Data Privacy, Manufacturing Practices & Food Safety Practices Data Privacy, Prevention of Sexual Harrassment, Integrity, Intellectual Property, Security awarness

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheEntityHaveProcesse: The Company receives an annual declaration from its Board of Directors and Key Managerial Personnel on the entities they are interested and ensures requisiste approvals as required under the statute as well as company's policies are in place before transacting with such entities and individuals.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfImprovementsInEnviron: The expense includes product innovations including utilization of spent streams to generate value added products. These developments bring in scope of reducing waste material disposaland products developed are used as Agri Inputs for improved agricultural outturns.
Capex includes investments in modern laboratory equipments which consumes less energy & better ease of operations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesInPlaceToS: Non degradable and degradable materials are disposed of as per the Waste disposal procedure in the stores department AFSM0706 i.e supplied to authorised recycle vendors.
Hazardous waste, e-waste etc is disposed engaging Government Authorised recycling centers and used oil is disposed with PCB approved agency.
Hazardous waste, e-waste etc is disposed engaging Government Authorised recycling centers and used oil is disposed with PCB approved agency.
Non degradable and degradable materials are disposed of as per the Waste disposal procedure in the stores department AFSM0706 i.e supplied to authorised recycle vendors.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:TheEntityHasNotApplicableCondu: LIFE CYCLE IS NOT APPLICABLE TO THE COMPANY'S PRODUCTS
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WhetherAnyStepsAreBeingTakenBy: NO DISABLED/DIFFERNTLY ABLED PERSON SO NOT TAKEN

xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOccupationalHealthAnd: AVTNPL IS CERTIFIED FOR oCCUPATIONAL hEALTH AND SAFETY MANAGEMENT SYSTEM ISO-45001-2018, WHICH COVERS ALL PROCESSING AND NON PROCESSING AREAS INCLUDING NEW PROJECTS.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DesclosureOfTheProcessesUsedTo: HAZARD IDENTIFICATION AND ASSESSMENT OF RISKS AND OPPORTUNITIES ARE IDENTIFIED FOR ALL ROUTINE AND NON ROUTINE ACTIVITIES, INFRASTURCTURE, EQUIPMENT, MATERIALS SUBSTANCES, AND PHYSICAL CONDITION OF THE WORKPLACE pRODUCTION, CONSTRUCTION, MAINTENANCE, DISPOSAL, HUMAN FACTORS ARE ALSO ADDRESSED.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMeasuresTakenByTheE: THE SAFETY MANAGEMENT SYSTEM IN THIS ORGANISATION MAINLY FOCUSSES ON A) OCCUPATIONAL HEALTH AND SAFETY POLICY B) COMPLIANCE TO LEGAL AND OTHER REQUIREMENTS C) PROCESS SAFETY MANAGEMENT-OPERATONAL CONTROL PROCEDURES TO ADDRESS PYSICAL, CHEMICAL,BIOLOGICAL, MECAHNICAL,PSYSCHOSOCIAL HAZARDS D)EMERGENCY PLANNING AND RESPONSE E)SAFETY TRAINING(NEED IDENTIFICATION AND ASSESSMENT) TO ALL WORKERS F)PLANT SAFETY INSPECTIONS G) SAGETY COMMITTEE MEETINGS H)INCIDENT REPORTING AND INVESTIGATIONS I) EMPLOYEE/CONTRACTWORKER CONSULTATION AND PARTICIPATION J) PERMIT TO WORK SYSTEM K) MANAGEMENT OF CHANGE L) SAETY COMPLIANCE AUDITS M)PRE-STARTUP SAFETY REVIEW N)SAFETY MANUAL,HANDBOOKS ETC O)SAFETY PROMOTIONAL ACTIVITIES P) SAFETY PROMOTIONAL ACTIVITIES-COMMUNIATON AND MOTIVATION Q)CORPORATE SOCIAL RESPONSIBILITY
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheProcessesForIdentif: Stakeholder engagement also helps to manage risks and oprrutinities in business operations. The key stakeholders identified in consultation with the copany's managementare customers, employes, shareholders, academic instutitions, staffing firms, other suppliers, technology partners and collaborators, industry bodies, governments NGOs, local communities, regulators and society at large.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:ProvideTheProcessesForConsulta: Stakeholder interactins results in the identification oflarge variety of issues important to the company. The Company then discuss with internal and external stakeholders, as well as its own judgement, to prioritize and arrive material topics with significant economic, environmental or social impacts on business, reputation and operations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesAsToHowTheIn: Suggestion from various forums and committeees, such as Safety Committee, Employee welfare committee Environment Protection Commitee or taken in to account for identification and management of environmental social topics.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfInstancesOfEngagement: The company has partnered directly with small land holder farmers across underdeveloped villages in Karnataka and TamilNadu to cultivate Marigold flowers. This initiative focusses on empowering farmers with limited land holdings by providing them with a consistent and reliable source of income. Beond agricultural engagement, the company has launched multiple infrastructure development projects in these communities as part of its Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) commitment. These projects are undertaken under the broader umbrella of the company's rural development initatives, which aim to improve the standard of lving and support holistic community growth.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Understanding Customer's expectations and the gaps, if anyin the company's products offerings.
Educating the investor community, Starategy for long term. Helping investors voice their concerns regarding the company policies reporting strategy etc., Understanding shareholder expectation.
Career management reviews: and Growth Prospects Learning opportunities Compensation structures Building a safety culture and inculcating safe work practices among employees
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StakeholderGroup: Governments, Local Communities, media, Society at large
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfOtherChannelsOfCommun: Annually : Website Print media, Public Functions, CSR Activites
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:PurposeAndScopeOfEngagementInc: Good Relationship Government bodies, Partnering with Local bodies for upliftment of the society
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheInternalMechanismsI: The Company has various committees (Healthand Safety Committee, POSH Committee, Trade Union Committees) wth representatio of employees, workers and management. Regular meetings are conducted at fixed intervals to address and seek the concerns of the employees. Various trainings are conducted on regular intervals.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsToPreventAdverseCons: AVTNPL treats all concerns related to discrimination and harassment with strict confidentiality. We are committed to providing a safe environment where individuals can report concerns in good faith without fear of retaliation Retaliation of any kind against an individual who raises concern or participates in an investigation is strictly prohibited. An employee found to be engaging in retaliatory behaviour will be subject to disciplinary action, up to any including termination of employment.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfABusinessProcessBeing: AVTNPL adopts a zero tolerance approach to issues related to human rights. Human rights are protected and upheld in company's core value and enshrined in the Company's Code of Conduct Policy. AVT NPL continually gathers feedback and keeps track of developments in the regulatory area to further strengthen existing processes.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfTheScopeAndCoverageOf: Yes, due diligence was conducted and AVT NPL follows all government regulations and regulatory policies of the countries where it operates.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfOtherAssessmentOfValueCh: All value chain partners are expected to adhere to by the Company's Code of conduct Pollicy
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfCoverageAndImplementa: AVTNPL is committed to sustainable water management. We optimize water consumption through process improvements, sewage treatment and rainwater harvesting. All water used on site is fully reated, recycled and re-used to meet non-process water requirements, minimizing waster and reducing our environmental footprint.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfProjectRelatedToReduc: AVTNPL has undertaken several energy efficiency and sustainability measures accross its facilities, contributing to the cost saving and a reduction is greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. Renewable Energy Procurement : initiated Power purchase from renewable sources through at Tiptur plant resulting in both energy cost savings and reduced GHG emissions. Gear box upgrade : Replaced conventional gearboxes in process plants with energy efficient Planetary gearboxes, significantly lowering energy consumption. Pump Optimization : Installed Variable Frequency Drives (VFDs) for cooling water pumps to optimize flow rates based on discharge temperature along with Thyristor controls for electric heaters, leading to improved energy efficiency. High Efficiency Pumps : Replaced outdated cooling water pumps with energy efficient models maintaining the same flow rate and h eat while reducing energy use. Lightining improvements : Upgraded to high efficiency LED lamps in the Solvent Extraction and Instant Tea Plants reducing electricity consumption. Heating Ventiliation and Air Conditioning (HVAC) Enhancement : Replaced old air conditions systems with air handling units in the AHN plant, utilizing chilled water for cooling achieving further energy savings.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DetailsOfWasteManagementPracti: The Company has in all its facilities Effluent Treatment Plants and has consent to operate as per A Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, Air(Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, Environment protection Act and Rules thereunder, Inspections are done by various authorities on regular intervals.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DisclosureWebLinkOfEntityAtWhi: The Company has business Continuity and Disaster Management plan designed to address the threat of disruptions to business activities or processes.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DiscloseAnySignificantAdverseI: No such instances during the reporting period.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: Commissioned new RO plant to recover pond water for instant tea process
Installed additional sludge dryer in ETP to reuse ETP sludge as Boiler fuel and reduction of waste disposal
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:InitiativeUndertaken: VFD control for cooling water pump
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:WebLinkForDetailsOfInitiativeT: Provided VFD for cooling water pump to operate pump optimum process conditions thus savings in energy
Replaced Air conditioner with Air handling unit to use chilled wate thereby reduction energy
Replaced Air conditioner with Air handling unit to use chilled wate thereby reduction energy
Replaced old cooling water pump, with new energy efficient moel to reduce energy consumptionad maintain the uptime
Replaced oldd conventional gearbox in process plants, with new energy efficient planetary gearbox to reduce energy consumption
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:NameOfTheTradeAndIndustryChamb: The Federation of Indian Chambers of Commerce andIndustry (FICCI)
Export Promotion Council of EOU & SEZ
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MethodResortedForSuchAdvocacy: Meetings with Ministry of Commerce, DGFT,CII and relevant Government Authorities
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsToReceive: Any grievances of the community where the company operates, were received through community Head / Local Administration. The Issue is then taken up an redressed by the plant site in charge with consultation from Head of Operations.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:FromWhichMarginalizedOrVulnera: Procures raw materials directly from small farmers with small land areas
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:DescribeTheMechanismsInPlaceTo: AVTNPl is committed to addressing customer complaints promptly and effectively to ensure continuous improvements and customer satisfaction. The complaint handling process is as follows : Customer complaints are received either verbally or in writing and are recorded in the Customer Complaint Registration Form. All relevant details ad supporting information are documents in this form. The completed complaint form is forwarded to the responsible personnel for further acton. An investigation is initiated for every complaint to determine the root cause. This involves a thorough analysis of all available data and information. Upon identifying and finailizing the root cause, appropriate Corrective and Preventive Actions (CAPA) are determined to address both the specific issue and to prevent recurrence. A detailed Complaint Investigation report is prepared, incorporating the findings, root cause and proposed CAPA. This report is shared with the customer for their review comments and approval. Approved corrective and preventive actions are implemented and integrated into the ystem with any necessary procedural or process modificaitons. The complaint is considered closed only after full implementation and effectiveness of the actions is verified.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:StepsTakenToInformAndEducateCo: Every Product shipment to customers is accompanied by data sheets having clear directions in terms of safe usage of products.
xbrli:xbrl.in-capmkt:MechanismsInPlaceToInformConsu: Yes. Customer communication protocol in place to intimate customer of the risks, if any.
